pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically configures and deletes this folder, and verifier.py asserts the exact folder name.
setup_task.sh copies exactly 7 .eml files to the target directory. verifier.py rigorously asserts actual count matches expected count (7).
setup_task.sh explicitly writes the 7 .eml files to /home/ga/Documents/OldEmails.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a folder precisely named 'Client Correspondence' under Local Folders in Thunderbird. Exactly 7 real email files (drawn from the SpamAssassin ham corpus) provided at /home/ga/Documents/OldEmails must be imported into this folder. Success is verified objectively by inspecting the Thunderbird mailbox backing store for exactly 7 newly imported messages with matching subjects.
